name: github-poller
description: Poll GitHub for new issues labeled 'ready-for-sparkflow' and dispatch feature-development for each.

poll.name: Poll GitHub
poll.description: Find new issues to work on. Emits an array of items as JSON.

items.description: Array of { issue_number, title, body } for issues not yet in progress.

dispatch.name: Queue feature-development per issue
dispatch.description: Write a dispatch-queue request per polled issue so each becomes its own top-level dashboard job.

sleep.name: Sleep before next poll
sleep.description: Wait between polls so we don't hammer the GitHub API.
